# Phase 0 smoke fixture — simplest rectangle + one hole. Exercises:
#   - polygon outer / polygon hole directives
#   - set <k>=<v> with alias normalization
#   - generate producing a total_stalls line
#   - snapshot producing a deterministic SVG golden

polygon outer
(0,0)
(240,0)
(240,160)
(0,160)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (0,0)-(240,160), area 38400

polygon hole
(90,60)
(150,60)
(150,100)
(90,100)
----
polygon hole 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (90,60)-(150,100), area 2400

set stall-angle=90
----

generate
----
total_stalls: 46
faces: 6 (boundary: 2, interior: 4)
graph: 16 vertices, 20 edges (perimeter: 16, interior: 4)
regions: 1
